sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90230" key="prosu/mbolon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσύμ-βολον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n90230.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">prognostic</tr_>, or perh. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">preliminary contribution</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ταῦτα μὲν εἰρήσθω προσύμβολα, ὥς φασι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
